headline: Gen Digital (GEN) Acquires Trellis to Enhance AI-Powered Insurance Marketplace
summary: Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ:GEN) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks under $30 to buy. On March 10, Gen Digital announced the acquisition of Trellis, which is a technology platform designed to simplify and automate the insurance shopping process. This acquisition integrates Trellis’s ML and conversational AI capabilities into Engine by Gen Digital, an embedded […]
